name: strike
description: Auto Strike workflow plus focused planning utilities for agent-assisted delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Auto Strike turns ideas into shipped changes with companion planning utilities
interface.longDescription: Strike packages Auto Strike plus focused utilities for agent-assisted delivery. Use Auto Strike to refine an idea, create durable initiative docs, split delivery phases into slices, build, review, verify, and close readiness. Companion utilities create planning demos, visualize systems, sharpen domain language, and write handoffs while keeping runtime state in the consuming repository.
defaultPrompt: Use Auto Strike to build and ship this idea.
Create a planning demo for this idea.
